title: always_comb behavior not work right
body: How may we help - what is your question? (If reporting a bug or requesting a feature please hit BACK on your browser and use a different issue templates.) when use verilator trans rtl to exe file, the logic inner always_comb not work right? verilator version issue rtl and wave after change always_comb to generate is works right So is there anything ways to avoid this issue?
